remarks: Welcome to The Morgan. This completely renovated open concept 2-bedroom, 1 full bathroom, with all new Stainless-steel appliances, Quartz countertops, In-unit washer and dryer laundry room, a large private terrace off the living room and much more. Abundance of closet space and large windows offering expansive views. Heat, hot water and cooking gas included. Also included are 2 assigned parking spaces. Brand New Fitness Center with State-of-the-Art equipment. Secure package mail room. Additional storage is available for rent. Located in the heart of Downtown Stamford. Short walk to Metro North and Steps to weekend farmers market, Library, medical facilitates, UCONN and some of the finest restaurants in Fairfield County. Pet friendly. Run don't walk! This won't last long.
